text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I won! I've cleared the 2,400-meter mark!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm not even tired in the slightest, even after
running 2,400 meters!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Looks like I've made a lot of progress!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I've not only got speed under my belt, but I have
stamina too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I think I have what it takes now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's time for the biggest stage... 3,600 meters!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Watch out, Centaur Stakes, I'm coming!
